subcodes.first_line: Recount the mercy of thy Lord upon His servant, that he may be numbered among them that remember, and that his eyes may be gladdened by the signs of God, his Lord, and be among [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر رحمه ربک عبده لیکون من المتذکرین و تقر من اثر الله ربه عیناه و یکون من
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @presence of; reunion with God, @spiritual transformation, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @knowledge; recognition of God
